task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

content.content:

client_onboarding_email_draft.txt

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment - Meridian Group & NovaBridge

Dear Priya,

We are thrilled to officially welcome you and the Meridian Group team to the Project Helios integration environment!

As we have discussed, Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform, designed to seamlessly streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply customizable transformation rules, and deliver clean data directly to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Knowing Meridian’s strong focus on reliable, live-data pipelines and ensuring a smooth transition to UAT, we are confident that Helios will provide your team with the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To help you get started, we will be sending your access credentials and comprehensive onboarding documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours. 

In the meantime, to keep our momentum going, please note the following next steps:

1. IT Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram so we can finalize the integration environment setup (target date: July 12, 2026).
2. UAT Access: Your team is scheduled to provision access to the UAT environment by July 19, 2026.
3. Stakeholder Demo: We will work together to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of our upcoming stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

If you have any technical questions, please feel free to reach out to Derek Okafor, our Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, or general inquiries, I will be your main point of contact at s.chen@novabridge.com. 

We are incredibly excited to partner with Meridian Group and look forward to a successful collaboration. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything at all.

Best regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have found the draft, reviewed it, and updated it to be more personalized, structured, and professional. The improved version has been saved back to the `client_onboarding_email_draft.txt` file in the sandbox as requested. 

I have not sent the email or taken any further actions, per your instructions.
